array.string: cd "__PROJECT_DIR__" && export NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_ENV=production; LOG_PREFIX="[openclass-web]"; while true; do BUILD_DIR="__PROJECT_DIR__/apps/web/.next"; BUILD_ID="$BUILD_DIR/BUILD_ID"; STAMP="$BUILD_DIR/openclass-source-stamp"; HEAD_SHA="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf nogit)"; REBUILD_REASON=""; if [[ ! -f "$BUILD_ID" ]]; then REBUILD_REASON="missing production build"; elif [[ ! -f "$STAMP" ]] || [[ "$(cat "$STAMP" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "$HEAD_SHA" ]]; then REBUILD_REASON="source revision changed"; else CHANGED_FILE="$(find "__PROJECT_DIR__/apps/web/src" "__PROJECT_DIR__/apps/web/package.json" "__PROJECT_DIR__/package.json" -type f -newer "$BUILD_ID" -print -quit 2>/dev/null || true)"; if [[ -n "$CHANGED_FILE" ]]; then REBUILD_REASON="source file changed: ${CHANGED_FILE#__PROJECT_DIR__/}"; fi; fi; if [[ -n "$REBUILD_REASON" ]]; then echo "$LOG_PREFIX $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') $REBUILD_REASON; rebuilding web"; rm -rf "$BUILD_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true; if ! npm run build:web; then echo "$LOG_PREFIX $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') web build failed; retrying in 5s"; sleep 5; continue; fi; mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"; printf "%s\n" "$HEAD_SHA" > "$STAMP"; else echo "$LOG_PREFIX $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') production build is current"; fi; echo "$LOG_PREFIX $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') starting Next.js production server on :3000"; npm --prefix apps/web run start; code=$?; echo "$LOG_PREFIX $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') server exited with code $code; restarting in 5s"; sleep 5; done
